synthesis.summary: DOW dropped ~11% on elevated volume (1.9x relative) with no supplied news to explain the move. The drop could reflect macro chemical sector pressure, institutional repositioning, or options-driven flows, but none of those mechanisms are evidenced in the available inputs.

The sell-off could reflect sector rotation out of chemicals, macro concerns around petrochemical demand, or large institutional repositioning — but none of these can be confirmed from available information.
